---
title: "Company History"
---

[← Gallery](../gallery.html)

::: {.timeline .vertical-alt .tl-label-banner}
::: {.event data-label="2002" style="--tl-color-accent: #41516C;"}
**Founding**
The company is incorporated and the founding team assembles.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2007" style="--tl-color-accent: #E24A68;"}
**First Product**
Version 1.0 ships to early customers after two years of development.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2012" style="--tl-color-accent: #FBCA3E;"}
**Series B**
Raised $20M to expand into new markets and double the team.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2017" style="--tl-color-accent: #4CADAD;"}
**Acquisition**
Acquired by a strategic partner, marking the end of the independent era.
:::
:::

`.vertical-alt` with `.tl-label-banner` and per-event `--tl-color-accent`. A single property threads the accent color through both the banner label and the dot.

````markdown
::: {.timeline .vertical-alt .tl-label-banner}
::: {.event data-label="2002" style="--tl-color-accent: #41516C;"}
**Founding**
The company is incorporated and the founding team assembles.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2007" style="--tl-color-accent: #E24A68;"}
**First Product**
Version 1.0 ships to early customers after two years of development.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2012" style="--tl-color-accent: #FBCA3E;"}
**Series B**
Raised $20M to expand into new markets and double the team.
:::
::: {.event data-label="2017" style="--tl-color-accent: #4CADAD;"}
**Acquisition**
Acquired by a strategic partner, marking the end of the independent era.
:::
:::
````
